REPLY OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR LEAVE TO CONDUCT PRETRIAL DISCOVER INTO THE FINANCIAL CONDITION OF DEFENDANT MICHAEL JOSEPH JOHN FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINGER, EDWARD E.

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF EDWARD WINGER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO CONDUCT PRETRIAL DISCOVERY INTO THE FINANCIAL CONDITION OF DEFENDANT MICHAEL JOSEPH JOHN IS DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL ON HIS CLAIM THE DEFENDANT ACTED WITH OPPRESSION, FRAUD, OR MALICE. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EXHIBIT A AND TO PARAGRAPH 7 OF THE MICHAEL JOSEPH JOHN DECLARATION ARE SUSTAINED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MICHAEL JOHN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT is granted. No opposition filed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Continued To Oct-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Conduct Pretrial Discovery Into The Financial Conditionl Of Deft Michael Joseph John
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Geoffrey Rotwein, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: EDWARD WINGER
Alexander Anolik, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Michael J. John

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF EDWARD WINGER's Motion For Leave To Conduct Pretrial Discovery Into The Financial Condition Of Defendant Michael Joseph John is denied. The court does not find a substantial probability that Plaintiff will prevail on his claim the Defendant acted with oppression, fraud, or malice.
Plaintiff's objections to Exhibit A and to paragraph 7 of the Michael Joseph John declaration are sustained. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
